prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2024–2025 年位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划小幅扩招 1 人（扩幅约 2.2%）、本省物理类考生略降约 596 人、工科热门专业吸引力较强等因素，扩招与考生减少部分抵消，但扩招幅度极小且近年位次后移惯性较强，预计 2026 年最低位次在 2025 年 13097 名基础上继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约 13300 名，区间 12800–13800 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 11000→10781→10604→12415→13097. In 2024, due to the new college entrance examination reform, the ranking significantly shifted backward by about 1811 places, and in 2025, it continued to shift backward by about 682 places; over the past two years, the cumulative backward shift is about 2493 places, showing a continuous backward trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 13097; the provincial science (physics category) enrollment plan was 38 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 39 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 45 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 46, a slight expansion of 1 person compared to 2025, an increase of about 2.2%, which has limited impact on competition but slightly intensifies it.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 56th, with recent rankings stable in the 48–61 range, belonging to the upper-middle level of 211 universities; from 2021 to 2026, there have been no incidents in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity rankings, or abnormal admission records, indicating a stable reputation with no significant negative public opinion or discontinuation events; Douyin exposure is average; the university has traditional strengths in geology, geological resources, and geological engineering, and is a science and engineering characteristic institution.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended; the university's enrollment majors are mainly engineering, with strong appeal for popular majors; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 110,868, a slight decrease of about 624 from 111,492 in 2025; the estimated number of physics category examinees is about 79,825, a slight decrease of about 596 from 80,421 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition; the provincial control line for the 2025 physics category undergraduate batch is 340 points, slightly lower than 345 points in 2024, suggesting a possible slight decrease in exam difficulty; the university is located in Wuhan, Hubei, not a local university in Jilin Province, so there is no provincial enrollment preference; the enrollment plan in Jilin Province accounts for a small proportion (about 0.5%–1%), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend in rankings from 2024 to 2025, the slight expansion of 1 person in the 2026 plan (an increase of about 2.2%), the slight decrease of about 596 physics category examinees in the province, and the strong appeal of popular engineering majors, the expansion and decrease in examinees partially offset each other, but the expansion is minimal and the recent backward momentum in rankings is strong. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will continue to shift slightly backward from the 2025 baseline of 13,097; the predicted minimum ranking is about 13,300, with a range of 12,800–13,800.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 12,800–13,800, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 12,800), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science and Electronic Information; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 13,800), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 safety majors to ensure admission.
